text: The system shall provide a Customer service management process.
The system shall maintain a Procurement process.
The system shall manage Product development and commercialization.
The system shall coordinate with customer relationship management to identify customer-articulated needs.
The system shall select materials and suppliers in conjunction with procurement.
The system shall maintain Manufacturing flow management processes.
The system shall manage Physical distribution.
The system shall maintain Outsourcing and Partnerships.
The system shall maintain Performance measurement for Cost, Productivity, Assets, and Quality.
The system must be web-based.
The system must be compliant with .Net technologies.
The system must use ASP.NET and C# as the programming languages.
The system must use MS SQL as the Database Management System.
The system shall integrate with Ejada's framework and two additional modules.
The system shall provide a login page containing text fields for username, password and a domain list box.
The system shall redirect the user to an error page if the username or password is incorrect.
The system shall allow a Coordinator to add, view, edit, and delete customers.
The system shall allow a Coordinator to add, view, edit, and delete items.
The system shall allow a Coordinator to add, view, edit, and delete suppliers.
The system shall allow a Coordinator to add, view, edit, and delete requests.
The system shall allow a Coordinator to add, view, edit, and delete resource locations.
The system shall allow a Customer to add, view, edit, and delete their own requests.
The system shall allow a Customer to edit their profile.
The system shall allow a Supplier to view pending supply requests and their details.
The system shall allow a Supplier to send feedback on a request.
The system shall allow a Supplier to edit their profile.
The system shall use TCP/IP as the communication protocol.
The system shall handle at least 100 concurrent users.
The system shall complete 90% of transactions in less than 1 second.
The system shall back up all data automatically every day.
The system shall be available 100% of the time.
The system shall restrict access based on three roles: coordinator, supplier, and customer.
